evals.prompt: Detecta o stack do projeto e salva o contexto.
evals.expected_output: Full 9-step detection runs. STACK CONTEXT block produced and saved to .opencode/stack-context.md with frontmatter containing generated_at and package_json_mtime. Self-log written.
assertions: package.json is read before any conclusions are made
folder structure is analyzed with ls commands
STACK CONTEXT block is saved to .opencode/stack-context.md
frontmatter in the saved file contains generated_at timestamp
frontmatter contains package_json_mtime for staleness checks
SKILL ADAPTATIONS REQUIRED section contains concrete stack-specific overrides
IMPORTANT NOTES flags any uncertainty with confidence levels
self-log is appended to stack-detector-log.jsonl with trigger field set

evals.prompt: Skill-orchestrator task: large complexity, cache exists at .opencode/stack-context.md and package.json has not changed since cache was generated.
evals.expected_output: Stack-detector is NOT called. Orchestrator reads the cache directly. Pipeline is built using the cached STACK CONTEXT.
assertions: stack-detector detection protocol does NOT run
cache file is read directly from .opencode/stack-context.md
cache staleness check is performed by comparing timestamps
package.json is NOT re-read for dependency analysis
STACK CONTEXT from cache is injected into agent prompts
no new entry is written to stack-detector-log.jsonl

evals.prompt: Skill-orchestrator task: gigantic complexity — migrating from Pages Router to App Router across the entire codebase.
evals.expected_output: Stack-detector runs fresh regardless of cache existence. Fresh detection overwrites the cache. Trigger logged as gigantic_task.
assertions: stack-detector full detection protocol runs even if cache exists
cache file is overwritten with fresh detection results
new generated_at and package_json_mtime are written to frontmatter
self-log entry trigger field is set to gigantic_task
SKILL ADAPTATIONS REQUIRED reflects any changes detected from previous cache
orchestrator pipeline is built from fresh detection not old cache

evals.prompt: Cache exists but package.json was modified after the cache was generated. Task is large complexity.
evals.expected_output: Staleness check detects the cache is stale. Stack-detector runs fresh. Cache is updated. Trigger logged as stale_cache.
assertions: generated_at from cache frontmatter is compared against package.json mtime
stale cache is detected correctly
stack-detector full detection protocol runs to refresh
new cache overwrites stale cache
self-log trigger field is set to stale_cache
agent prompts receive freshly detected stack not the stale version
